title: Enterprise S-Series - MaiStorage
text:
Enterprise S-Series - MaiStorage
Skip to content
SATA S-Series
Efficiently manage the power consumption of your legacy servers with high-performance and large-capacity MaiStorage SATA S-Series products, designed to extend the life and capabilities of your existing servers without a complete overhaul of your existing infrastructure.
SA50
High-Endurance SATA SSD for the Most Demanding Enterprise Applications
The SA50 SSD is a best-in-class SATA SSD solution that scales to 15.36TB (SA50V) and up to 3 DWPD (SA50E) to provide a wide variety of options for diverse application and cold storage needs.
Contact us
Download brochure
Interface Specifications
SATA III
2.5"
Capacity
480 GB up to 15.36 TB
SSD Power Consumption
Active: 5.4W
Idle: 1.9W
Performance
Seq Read (up to)
530 MB/s
Seq Write (up to)
500 MB/s
Random Read (up to)
98 KIOPs
Random Write (up to)
77 KIOPs
Malaysia's New Storage Technology Solutions Supplier
